controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Individuals process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Individuals process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Individuals process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your Customer Identification Procedure include risk-based systems and controls designed to enable you to be reasonably satisfied that individual customers are who they claim to be?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based systems and controls for being reasonably satisfied about individual customer identity
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include appropriate risk-based systems and controls to enable reasonable satisfaction that individual customers are who they claim to be. Implement risk-based controls that assess ML/TF risk and adjust the level of identification assurance accordingly, as required under rule 4.2.2.

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information for individual customers (not sole traders)?
controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information process does not collect the minimum required information for individual customers. Update your procedure to collect full name, date of birth, and residential address for every individual customer (excluding sole traders) before commencing a designated service, as required under rules 4.2.3, 4.2.3(1), 4.2.3(2), and 4.2.3(3).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information for sole trader customers?

items.label: Principal place of business address (if any)

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information process does not collect the minimum required information for sole trader customers. Update your procedure to collect full name, date of birth, business name (if any), principal place of business address or residential address, and ABN (if issued) for every sole trader customer, as required under rules 4.2.4, 4.2.4(1), 4.2.4(2), 4.2.4(3), 4.2.4(4), and 4.2.4(5).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information beyond the minimum should be collected about individual customers?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach for determining when to collect additional KYC information
controls.remediation: Your ML/TF Risk Assessment process does not include appropriate risk-based systems and controls for determining whether additional KYC information should be collected beyond the minimum requirements. Implement risk-based controls that assess customer ML/TF risk and determine when additional information collection is warranted, as required under rule 4.2.5.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the minimum required KYC information for individual customers?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not verify the minimum required KYC information. Update your procedure to verify the customer's full name and either their date of birth or residential address for every individual customer, as required under rules 4.2.6, 4.2.6(1), 4.2.6(2), 4.2.6(2)(a), and 4.2.6(2)(b).

controls.label: Is verification of customer information based on reliable and independent documentation, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination of both?
controls.detail-label: Describe the sources you use for verification (documentation, electronic data, or combination)
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not require verification to be based on reliable and independent sources. Update your procedure to ensure all verification is based on reliable and independent documentation, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination of both, as required under rules 4.2.7, 4.2.7(1), 4.2.7(2), and 4.2.7(3).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information beyond the minimum should be verified?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach for determining when to verify additional KYC information
controls.remediation: Your ML/TF Risk Assessment process does not include appropriate risk-based systems and controls for determining whether additional collected KYC information should be verified. Implement risk-based controls that assess customer ML/TF risk and determine when additional verification is warranted beyond the minimum requirements, as required under rule 4.2.8.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies that arise during verification?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you respond to verification discrepancies to determine reasonable satisfaction about customer identity
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not include appropriate risk-based systems and controls for responding to discrepancies discovered during verification. Implement controls to investigate and resolve verification discrepancies so you can determine whether you are reasonably satisfied that the customer is who they claim to be, as required under rule 4.2.9.

controls.label: Do you use the documentation-based safe harbour procedure for medium or lower ML/TF risk individual customers?
controls.remediation: This is an informational question about whether you use the optional documentation-based safe harbour procedure. If you answered when you intended to skip, please review your verification approach for medium or lower risk individual customers as described in rule 4.2.10.

controls.label: Do you use the electronic-based safe harbour procedure for medium or lower ML/TF risk individual customers?
controls.remediation: This is an informational question about whether you use the optional electronic-based safe harbour procedure. If you answered when you intended to skip, please review your verification approach for medium or lower risk individual customers as described in rule 4.2.12.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: General CDD Obligation
groups.description: Top-level requirement to be reasonably satisfied about individual customer identity through risk-based controls.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information
groups.description: Minimum KYC information that must be collected for individual customers and sole traders before commencing a designated service.

groups.title: Verification of Information
groups.description: Verification requirements for collected KYC information, including acceptable sources and optional safe harbour procedures.

groups.title: Additional KYC Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based decisions about whether to collect and verify KYC information beyond the minimum requirements.

groups.title: Discrepancy Handling
groups.description: Systems and controls for responding to discrepancies discovered during the verification process.
